finding: Prenatal Risk Factors for Congenital Heart Disease

differentials.name: Arrhythmias
differentials.raw: Arrhythmias (a)  fixed fetal bradycardia (50%) ≤ 110 bpm (b)  tachycardia (low risk) (c)  irregular: PACs, PVCs (low risk)

differentials.name: Abnormal fetal karyotype: CHD in Down syndrome (40%); in trisomy 18 / 13 (> 90%);
differentials.raw: Abnormal fetal karyotype: CHD in Down syndrome (40%); in trisomy 18 / 13 (> 90%);

differentials.name: Extracardiac somatic anomalies by US: omphaloceles (20%), duodenal atresia, hydrocephaly, spina bifida, VACTERL
differentials.raw: Extracardiac somatic anomalies by US: omphaloceles (20%), duodenal atresia, hydrocephaly, spina bifida, VACTERL
